memoryArtifacts.description:
arguerite de l'Aigle, née en 1104, morte le 25 mai 1141. Elle devint reine consort de Navarre par son mariage en 1130.

Biographie

Elle est la fille de Gilbert de l'Aigle et de Juliette du Perche. Pa …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarete de L'Aigle於1100年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內利艾格爾時，她的父親Gilbert de  L'Aigle31歲，母親Juliana du Perche26歲。她於1131年與García Ramírez King of Navarre在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1141年5月25日在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納享年41歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: South German: from a diminutive of   Laib  .

variants.name: Laib
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a baker, from Middle High German leip ‘loaf’.

nameMeanings.name: Margarete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarete de L'Aigle was born in 1100, in L'Aigle, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, was 31 and her mother, Juliana du Perche, was 26. She married García Ramírez King of Navarre in 1131, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 May 1141, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, at the age of 41, and was buried in Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarete de L'Aigle est née en 1100, à L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Juliana du Perche, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé García Ramírez King of Navarre en 1131, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1141, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarete de L'Aigle 1100 in L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de  L'Aigle 31 und ihre Mutter Juliana du Perche 26. Sie hat 1131 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien García Ramírez King of Navarre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Mai 1141 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien und wurde in Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

Lei sposato García Ramírez King of Navarre nel 1131, nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1141, nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarete de L'Aigleが1100年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンル'アイグルで生まれた時，父Gilbert de  L'Aigleは31歳，母Juliana du Percheは26歳であった。1131年にスペインナファロアイルnアでGarcía Ramírez King of Navarreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1141年5月25日にスペインナファロアイルnアで41歳で死去し，スペインナファロアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarete de L'Aigle(이)가 1100년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 '아익일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de  L'Aigle(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana du Perche(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1131년 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 García Ramírez King of Navarre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1141년 5월 25일 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarete de L'Aigle родилась в 1100 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilbert de  L'Aigle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana du Perche, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени García Ramírez King of Navarre в 1131 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 мая 1141 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности нафарроа, Испания.
